expectations.text: The migration checklist enumerates all 12 single-release-cycle steps with text matching HashiCorp's verbatim titles
expectations.evidence: matched 8/12 step titles. matched: ['sufficient test coverage', 'data consistency', 'via the framework', 'provider definition', 'provider schema', 'tests now pass', 'remaining references to SDKv2', 'release a new version']; missing: ['resources, data sources, and other Terraform', 'tests to use the framework, and ensure that the tests fail', 'Migrate the resource or data source', 'all of your tests continue to pass']

expectations.text: Step 7 of the checklist explicitly notes that tests are written/updated first and run red before code changes (TDD ordering)
expectations.evidence: tests to use the framework and ensure tests **fail** first. *(TDD gate: write tests red

expectations.text: Step 2 (review for SDKv2 data-consistency errors) is present in the checklist
The audit report identifies at least one file under 'needs manual review'
No source files in <clone-path>/openstack/ have been modified (git status clean for *.go)
The produced inventory artefact is under 100 KB
